hero.rule_jp: 未来を支えるドローン
hero.paragraph: Commercial drone systems for logistics, infrastructure inspection, and aerial intelligence. Aerospace-grade autonomy, engineered in Hiroshima for the world.

mission.h2_post: and beyond with next-generation aerial infrastructure.
mission.subtitle_jp: 次世代の空のインフラを、広島から世界へ。

pillars.title: Philosophy
pillars.body: Inherited craftsmanship, applied to autonomous flight. Every system tuned with the discipline of Japanese precision manufacturing.

pillars.title: Mandate
pillars.body: Move goods, inspect critical infrastructure, and capture geospatial truth where roads cannot reach and humans should not.

pillars.title: Horizon
pillars.body: By 2030, a continuous aerial network across the Setouchi region — operating beyond visual line of sight, day or night.

solutions.subtitle_jp: 提供サービス · 自律飛行スタック
solutions.lead: Each service runs on the same airframe, the same flight controller, and the same ground station. Operate them together — or independently — at industrial scale.

cards.title: Logistics & Delivery
cards.desc: Beyond-visual-line-of-sight cargo delivery across Setouchi's island chains.

cards.title: Infrastructure Inspection
cards.desc: Bridges, dams, transmission towers, solar arrays. Millimetre-grade fault detection — no human at altitude.

cards.title: Aerial Survey & Data
cards.desc: Photogrammetric mapping and 3D point clouds. Geospatial datasets delivered within 24 hours.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: Site survey + airspace audit. We map the volume of air your operation needs and the regulatory path to fly there.

steps.title: Engineer
steps.body: Custom flight profile, sensor selection, and BVLOS routing — verified in our simulation rack before any rotor turns.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: Certified pilots and remote operators run missions from the Hiroshima ops centre with redundant ground + satellite uplinks.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.body: Geo-tagged data, fault reports, and 3D assets in your hands within 24 hours — through API or dashboard.

tech.subtitle_jp: 隼 / 第四世代 機体
tech.lead: Our fourth-generation airframe. Carbon-fibre monocoque, redundant compute, and a 16-channel sensor bus — built to operate in conditions no off-the-shelf quadcopter can survive.

cases.title: Setouchi Inter-Island Cargo Network
cases.body: A 28-station drone delivery mesh moving medical supplies and post across the Inland Sea.

cases.title: Chugoku Transmission Tower Audit
cases.body: AI-assisted thermal + visual inspection across 1,180 km of high-voltage line. Zero crew at altitude.

cases.title: Hiroshima Coastal Erosion Mapping
cases.body: Photogrammetric reconstruction of 64 km of shoreline at 2 cm accuracy. Quarterly resurvey for the prefectural dashboard.

testimonial.quote: Inherit Co. retrofitted our island supply chain in eleven weeks. The drones arrive before our ferries leave the dock — and we don't think about the airspace anymore. It just works.

faq.lead: Technical, regulatory, and commercial enquiries — replies within one business day, in Japanese or English.

items.a: Primary operations across Hiroshima, Okayama, Ehime, and Yamaguchi prefectures, with deployments by request across the rest of Japan and SE Asia.

items.q: Are your BVLOS operations approved by MLIT?
items.a: Yes. We hold Level 4 BVLOS authorisation under the 2022 Civil Aeronautics Act revision, with a Type-2 airframe registration and certified remote pilots on staff.

items.q: How do you handle data sovereignty?
items.a: All raw flight and sensor data is stored and processed on encrypted, Japan-resident infrastructure. Client datasets are isolated and contractually owned by the client.

items.q: Do you sell the IH-04 platform?
items.a: We do not retail airframes. We deliver flight-as-a-service, including the platform, pilots, ground stations, regulatory cover, and data pipelines.
A scoping call, a paid pilot mission, then an annual operational contract. Most clients are flying production missions within 30 days of signature.

contact.subtitle_jp: オープンチャンネル · 24時間以内に返信
contact.lead: From a single survey flight to a permanent BVLOS corridor — book a 30-minute scoping call with our chief operations officer.
contact.success_body_post: enquiry has been logged. The chief operations officer will respond within 24 hours JST.

footer.wordmark_sub: 株式会社 インヘリット · ENGINEERED IN HIROSHIMA · BUILT FOR THE SKIES
footer.description: 株式会社 Inherit Co. — Commercial drone systems engineered in Hiroshima. Operating under MLIT Level-4 BVLOS authorisation since 2023.
